notes: Out of the box, the game crashes on loading screen. Adding "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" to launch options fixes the error, however you will encounter a font problem where text does not show. To fix this, simply rename SDNXLFonts.dll or delete it, and it will resort to ugly looking fonts. The game is playable and works great, even performance-wise.
title: Sorcerer King: Rivals

notes: Works out of the box. Able to start a campaign, play a few rounds, save/load, use menus. Everythings functional.
title: Sorcerer King: Rivals
